content.en:
There were only Ye Tian and Yan Ancestor here, and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords couldn't hear their conversations, they could chat casually.

Yan Zu spoke, "Lord of Endless, I want to invite you to join the Xuanyan Society. "

"Xuanyan Society, what kind of force is this?"

Ye Tian had never heard of this force, there was no Xuanyan Society among the nine top overlord-level forces!

Yan Zu said with a smile: "The Xuanyan Society is not a force, it is an exchange meeting established by me and some Origin Upper Realm Overlords, the purpose is to improve together faster. Currently, there are sixteen members of the Xuanyan Society, and if you join, it will be seventeen. "

"If I join, what do I have to gain and what do I have to give?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yan Zu said: "If you join the Xuanyan Society, you can get a lot of information, information, and cultivation experience, as for what to pay, you need to make an origin oath, and if you research something, you need to share the information with other members." "

When Ye Tian heard this, he felt that this request was very reasonable.

He pondered for a moment and said, "Yan Ancestor, there are so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Land of Eternity, why don't you join forces to study it together, wouldn't it be better this way?"

Yan Zu smiled and said, "That's impossible, the nine top overlord forces are very hostile to each other, if you are a member of the other top overlord forces, I won't invite you." Moreover, many of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords had hatred among themselves, and it was impossible for such an exchange organization to recruit a large number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords. At present, the Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Eternal Beyond Land are all studying separately and cannot be united. We also think you are a good fit, so we invite you. "

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tian really needed a place like the Xuanyan Society to learn more about it now.

Besides, it's just an exchange of information, and such a force has no constraints on himself, so he is naturally willing to join!

"Lord of Endless, let me introduce the other members of the Xuanyan Society to meet you. "

Yanzu said.

Soon.

Ye Tian met the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Xuanyan Society, which was a preliminary meeting and had an understanding.

And after Ye Tian made the Origin Oath, he became a member of the Xuanyan Society.

Subsequently.

Yan Zu passed on some information to Ye Tian, so that he had enough understanding of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and there was too much information about those materials, even Ye Tian had to study it for a long time.

Through these materials, Ye Tian knew that the Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Eternal Beyond Land had studied three paths respectively, and it was difficult to say which of these three paths was better, but at least they could all improve their strength.

No matter which path it is, it is necessary to raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm, the Origin of the Other Shore to the point where it is difficult to continue to improve, and the Will of the Origin Realm to the extent that it is difficult to continue to improve.

At this time, it is necessary to choose one of these three paths to improve strength.

The first path is to study the Origin Ancestor of the Other Side, any kind of Origin Ancestor of the Other Shore seems to be able to awaken, but the way of awakening is different, the path is different, there is no complete system yet, but once the more awakenings, the more terrifying the strength will be.

But this method also has flaws, that is, once the other side of the origin ancestor awakens, the other side of the origin ancestor will absorb the power of the other side of the source, the more times the awakening, the other side of the origin will one day completely shatter, into the body, the other side of the origin into a part of the body, can no longer improve the other side of the origin, can only be awakened again and again, one way to go to the dark.

The second path is to specifically improve the origin of the other side, and some of them create their own methods to improve their own origin on the other side, breaking the boundaries of the origin of the other side again and again.

This method also has a flaw, that is, if the other side of the origin is too powerful, it will be difficult for the other side of the origin ancestor to awaken, and there will be no way to take the path of the awakening of the other side of the origin ancestor.

There is a third way, that is, to take the path of the will of the Origin Realm, to sublimate the will of the Origin Realm, to merge into the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, to abandon one's physical body, to become a part of the origin of the land of eternity, and to use the origin of the land of eternity to condense the body and walk on the land of eternity.

The Origin Upper Realm Overlord who uses the third way to increase his strength is called the Origin Dao Ancestor!

This kind of Origin Dao Ancestor will not be able to leave the land of the other side of eternity in the future, but its strength is very strong, and it is immortal and immortal, and there is no way to be killed, unless the entire land of the other side of eternity is destroyed.

Of course.

Origin Dao Ancestors can be sealed, so these Origin Dao Ancestors do not dare to offend people indiscriminately.

Now, there are as many as sixteen Origin Dao Ancestors who have been sealed in the Land of Eternity, all of which have been sealed by many Origin Upper Realm Overlords after they have been expanded.

Currently, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who chooses the first path has the most, followed by the second, and the third path the least.

After all, when you reach the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, as long as you don't die, the probability of falling is still very low, and it is not easy to say the third path, you have to abandon your physical body, melt your body into the origin of the eternal shore, and completely give up the hope of leaving the land on the other side of eternity.

Therefore, some Origin Upper Realm Overlords were still unwilling to take the third path.

Right now.

Each of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords is studying their own paths, hoping to perfect them and get rid of their flaws.

Of course, there are also Origin Upper Realm Overlords who are researching new paths, but it is difficult to open up new paths, and more Origin Upper Realm Overlords are needed to join them.

"Three paths, the last one, I definitely have to give up!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the first path and the second path, he didn't know which path to choose, if the two paths could be cultivated together, then it would be perfect.

However, these two paths are currently in conflict, and there is no way to cultivate together.

"Don't think about it yet, I'm still some way away from taking these three paths, and I'll think about this after I raise the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the Ten Percent Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

The exchange meeting began.

This exchange meeting is not just about exchanging with each other, according to Yan Zu, this exchange meeting is to exchange treasures, exchange self-created secret methods, even if it is a mutilated secret method, but as long as it is useful for their own cultivation path, they will trade with each other.

Ye Tiancai entered the circle of the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and this time it was just a rise in knowledge.

"Selling a secret medicine recipe can help the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm complete the first awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, with a success rate of up to 30% ......"

One of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords shouted.
